sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1614" key="a)eilamph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀει-λαμπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n1614.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Ὄλυμπος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ever-shining</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.22.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
